name: onecodex
description: Independent desktop control station for codexapp
author: accelizero

scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && ONECODEX_BUNDLE_TARGET=darwin-arm64 npm run bundle:runtime -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config.directories.output=release/darwin-arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && ONECODEX_BUNDLE_TARGET=darwin-x64 npm run bundle:runtime -- --platform darwin --arch x64 && electron-builder --mac --x64 --config.directories.output=release/darwin-x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:x64: npm run build && ONECODEX_BUNDLE_TARGET=win32-x64 npm run bundle:runtime -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && electron-builder --win --x64 --config.directories.output=release/win32-x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:arm64: npm run build && ONECODEX_BUNDLE_TARGET=win32-arm64 npm run bundle:runtime -- --platform win32 --arch arm64 && electron-builder --win --arm64 --config.directories.output=release/win32-arm64 --publish never
